heading: Aggregation Framework Limitations
body:
Atlas Functions support aggregation on the both the database and collection
level using the following commands:

- [db.aggregate()](manual/reference/method/db.aggregate)

- [db.collection.aggregate()](manual/reference/method/db.collection.aggregate)

All [aggregation pipeline stages](manual/reference/operator/aggregation-pipeline)
stages are available to the *system user* except for `$indexStats`.

Atlas Functions support all [aggregation pipeline operators](manual/reference/operator/aggregation) when you run an aggregation pipeline
in the [system functions](atlas-system-functions) context.
